case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. KIMBERLY PALMA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $955.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT PALMER, KIMBERLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $45.50) SERVED JUN-02-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PALMER, KIMBERLY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALMER, KIMBERLY $955.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.50, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND THIS JUDGMENT ARE AMENDED TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME TO KIMBERLY PALMER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
